summary: Add sanctioned 'hx doti bug release-docs' (BugReleaseDocCommit): fail-closed gated on a release-ready bug member (ReleaseReadyBugMembers >=1), stages exactly README.md+CHANGELOG.md (never git add -A), commits with the PrecommitGuard sentinel + 032 lock-retry; a post-gate commit failure classifies as Integrity (ITG0016) for parity with doti update. Prunes the stale doti-cycle-commit spec mirage.
